subcodes.first_line: Hast thou beheld the Hour upon the temple of man? Say: Yea, by my Lord, the All-Merciful! Verily it moveth and speaketh with truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل رایت الساعه علی هیکل الانسان قل ای و ربی الرحمن انها تمشی و تنطق بالحق
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @transcendence; unknowability of God
